name: twitter-profile-lookup
description: Look up a Twitter/X profile and recent tweets via Scrape Creators, routed through the SELAT Router (tempo-native MPP). Returns bio, follower/following counts, verified status, and recent tweet engagement for a public handle.

handle.description: Twitter/X handle without the @ (e.g. openai, sama, AnthropicAI)

trim.description: Set to "true" for a trimmed tweets response (less payload)

steps.label: profile — Scrape Creators (MPP / tempo-native, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
recent tweets — Scrape Creators (MPP / tempo-native, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
